description: Start with a point at (0,0). At each iteration, add a new point by going one step up or to the right from the current point, choosing the option that gives the least maximum number of points on a line through the new point. In case of ties, compare the number of points on the line with the next largest number of points, etc. If there is still a tie, go to the right. a(n) is 0 if the n-th step is to the right, 1 if the step is upwards.
